title: The Neanderthal DNA Puzzle No One Can Explain - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich about unsolved mysteries in Neanderthal DNA and paleogenomics. The episode examines puzzles in ancient genomic data that remain without consensus explanation.
